hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in */__tests__/*|*/widgets/*) : ;; */src/pages/*.vue) jq -n --arg c "REMINDER: a page view under src/pages/ was edited. If it backs a GET route it must ship a Vitest refresh test (cold mount, fresh Pinia+router+Vue Query, assert it renders) in a co-located __tests__/ folder before done — see the web-feature-dev skill." '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$c}}' ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true
